### How to Test

Steps to validate locally:

1. `pnpm install`
2. `pnpm dev` (launches the desktop app in development mode)
3. `pnpm build` (produces a production bundle in `src-tauri/target/release/bundle/`)

### Checklist

- [ ] Title is clear and descriptive
- [ ] Related issue linked (if any)
- [ ] Manual verification steps included
- [ ] `pnpm dev` launches without runtime errors
- [ ] `pnpm build` completes successfully on at least one platform
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)
